title: VibeGuard Project Configuration
description: Project-level .vibeguard.json configuration — overrides global defaults for this repository

profile.description: Runtime enforcement profile. minimal=pre-hooks only, core=standard runtime hooks, full=core plus stop/build hooks, strict=same hook set as full with stricter policy

enforcement.description: Enforcement level. block=hard stop, warn=downgrade to warnings, off=skip all hooks

languages.description: Languages active in this project. Affects which guard scripts and rules are applied

disabled_hooks.description: Hook names to disable (without .sh extension). e.g. ["post-edit-guard", "analysis-paralysis-guard"]

disabled_rules.description: Rule IDs to suppress. Canonical ids come from rules/claude-rules/. e.g. ["U-02", "W-13"]

disabled_guards.description: Guard script names to skip. e.g. ["check_unwrap_in_prod", "check_any_abuse"]

gc.description: Garbage-collection retention and size thresholds used by scripts/gc/*.sh.

log_threshold_mb.description: Archive events.jsonl when it reaches this size in MB. Env override: VIBEGUARD_GC_LOG_THRESHOLD_MB.

archive_retain_months.description: Delete monthly compressed event archives older than this many months. Env override: VIBEGUARD_GC_ARCHIVE_RETAIN_MONTHS.

worktree_max_days.description: Remove clean VibeGuard worktrees inactive for at least this many days. Env override: VIBEGUARD_GC_WORKTREE_MAX_DAYS.

session_metrics_retain_days.description: Keep session-metrics.jsonl entries for this many days. Env override: VIBEGUARD_GC_SESSION_METRICS_RETAIN_DAYS.

learning_window_days.description: Lookback window for scheduled learning digest event analysis. Env override: VIBEGUARD_GC_LEARNING_WINDOW_DAYS.

gc_log_max_kb.description: Trim gc-cron.log when it exceeds this size in KB. Env override: VIBEGUARD_GC_LOG_MAX_KB.
